PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for Co-Petitioners.

The Court noted that exhibit A to the declaration of the estate planning Attorney was not attached. Ms. Fox stated that she filed it and provided a courtesy copy. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is under submission for review of the attachment with the expectation that the Court will grant it. The Court stated that the order should say "Decedent's will erroneously dated March 21, 2013". Status on close of estate is set for November 4, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Bond is not required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-10-2019 Continued To May-08-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
